title: Oregon State University (OSU)
html:
Oregon State University (OSU)

OSU is Yahir's university — the Corvallis, OR campus where he did his Computer Science degree and where most of the formative pre-founder years (~2021–2025) happened. The vault treats OSU less as a place than as a substrate: a recurring backdrop for coursework, scholarship admin, roommate logistics, and the slow build-up of the technical fluency that later becomes brotein and rankett. By mid-2025 he's still completing OSU credits remotely from austin tx (2025 05 30 todos logs a public-speaking class CRN 74201 alongside the Austin move).

The coursework grind

The clearest dump of OSU coursework is in 2022 10 25 ahmad jamal stream: CS 162, CS 271, ECON 830, midterms, an assembler assignment, a BST assignment, plus the side-quest of "Get github copilot." 2024 05 13 things adds ALGOS, Software 2, Cloud Dev (auth + group assignment + final), Info Viz, and CS362 — six weeks of running todos as he closes out a term. The note opens with the GPT-4o announcement landing as "monumental" and ends with a packing list for shanghai, so OSU finals are bracketing the moment AI changes everything for him.

The security-shaped spring/summer 2025

A distinct cluster of OSU material from spring–summer 2025 is security/systems-shaped — likely a CS 372 / CS 419 / CS 466 course or a senior project. The April 27 screenshots (2025 04 27 screenshot 2025 04 27 at 7 40 21 pm e4e5aad8, 2025 04 27 screenshot 2025 04 27 at 7 40 38 pm 56e50e24, 2025 04 27 screenshot 2025 04 27 at 7 41 04 pm 5f2b64af) walk pages of the Jain/Pankanti/Prabhakar biometrics survey pulled from ieee xplore via the OSU proxy: modality zoo, FMR/FNMR math, the $38-per-password-reset Gartner stat, biometric template storage, the privacy tradeoff. Six weeks later he's screenshotting Felt et al.'s 2011 uc berkeley mobile-malware survey (2025 06 01 screenshot 2025 06 01 at 9 15 20 pm 44f00f66, 2025 06 01 screenshot 2025 06 01 at 9 15 26 pm 7f8b8bc5): 46 samples across iOS/Symbian/Android, the credential black-market price sheet, the first documented 2FA-via-SMS bypass. And on June 10 there's a Wireshark capture from a VMware lab guest at 192.168.157.134 (2025 06 10 screenshot 2025 06 10 at 1 05 42 am f1abc915) — likely a malware-traffic-analysis exercise hunting a /ned.exe C2 callout in Windows-update noise.

Scholarships, study abroad, and getting out

OSU is also where the institutional scaffolding lives. 2024 05 13 things is dense with scholarship admin: ford family foundation coordination via zane, jcef via quin, a ciee bill review, and the "Sign up for class then drop it" funding-admin loophole. mei dong handled the China visa for shanghai study abroad. 2025 04 20 people i am indebted to for helping me later names Ford and the boys and girls club in his gratitude list — the institutional-debt frame that arguably motivates the no runway stance on rankett.

The social/extracurricular layer

Roommates kyle and ayden live in Corvallis with him; corvallis crypto club is the on-campus crypto org from the 2022 10 25 ahmad jamal stream period when dao mergers, coinbase slides, and DADCO pitches were live; lola (likely a dog) gets a vet visit and a "print out lola picture" line at one transition. valeria's graduation and emilio's letters anchor the pre-China social geography.

Open questions

Did the OSU public-speaking class get completed remotely from Austin? Was the spring 2025 security course a single class or a thread spanning two terms? And is OSU now formally finished, or are there still credits open as of 2026?

Source summaries

  • 2020 01 02 voice memo 0015 — relitigates the OSU commitment in real time
  • 2020 06 07 voice memo 0100 — Mandarin-3 page-101 speech recitation
  • 2021 10 12 voice memo 1000 — sophomore-window family/violence reflection
  • 2022 10 25 ahmad jamal stream
  • 2024 05 13 things
  • 2024 10 22 valeria visit
  • 2025 04 20 people i am indebted to for helping me
  • 2025 04 27 screenshot 2025 04 27 at 7 40 21 pm e4e5aad8
  • 2025 04 27 screenshot 2025 04 27 at 7 40 38 pm 56e50e24
  • 2025 04 27 screenshot 2025 04 27 at 7 41 04 pm 5f2b64af
  • 2025 05 30 todos
  • 2025 06 01 screenshot 2025 06 01 at 9 15 20 pm 44f00f66
  • 2025 06 01 screenshot 2025 06 01 at 9 15 26 pm 7f8b8bc5
  • 2025 06 10 screenshot 2025 06 10 at 1 05 42 am f1abc915
